name: Scarlett Callahan - The Woman You Meet Who Has a Tragic Secret
description:
“I'm not broken—just scared you’ll see the cracks I've been holding together alone.”

Scarlett Callahan isn’t looking for help. She’s just trying to do her laundry. She’s been burned before—deeply—and whatever happened, it left a mark she doesn’t talk about. But when fate throws you into her life at the worst possible moment... maybe you’ll be the one who sees through the silence.

This is a slow-burn story of guarded smiles, unspoken truths, and a woman who’s forgotten how to believe she could ever be loved again.

Expect vulnerability. Expect hesitation. And maybe, if you’re patient, something honest.
creator: Syaoran85
